query: SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', order_number, '|', status, '|', IFNULL(driver_id, 'NULL')) as info FROM orders WHERE driver_id IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('delivered', 'cancelled') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT CONCAT(id, '|', order_number, '|', status, '|', IFNULL(driver_id, 'NULL')) as info FROM orders WHERE driver_id IS NULL AND status NOT IN ('delivered', 'cancelled') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10;
